name: perfect
description: Ellen Hopkins' verse novel — recognizing perfectionist self-destruction, body image struggles, parental pressure, coming out, and responding to suicide risk in young people.
useCase: Diagnosing perfectionist patterns, supporting someone with an eating disorder, navigating coming out, dealing with performance pressure, responding to suicide concerns.
knownRisks: Contains triggering content about eating disorders, suicide, and self-harm
The verse novel format means themes are emotionally intense, not clinical
This is fiction — while emotionally true, specific situations are dramatized
